case_title: JOEL ANGELES VS. CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANGELES, JOEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEGSCO LLC

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANGELES, JOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND C0UNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TEGSCO LLC $973.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $973.00, THIS JUDGMENT IS AMENDED TO INCLUDE STATEMENT OF DECISION. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $723. AUTO RETURN TEGSCO SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $250. SEE STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOEL ANGELES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RYON HAYWARD. DEFENDANT TEGSCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN VP. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
